name: Kinana ibn Atiq
title: Brave Reciter
shortDescription: A warrior from Kufa and Quran reciter who rushed to Imam Hussain's (AS) side on Ashura and was martyred in the first attack.
fullStory:
Kinana ibn Atiq al-Taghlibi was a known hero and warrior in Kufa. Besides his bravery in battles, he was also a prominent reciter of the Quran and had deep faith in his heart.

When Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan reached Karbala, Kinana, who was enamored with the Ahl al-Bayt (AS), considered it his duty to assist the Prophet's (PBUH) son. He managed to leave Kufa and reached the Imam's camp in time.

On the day of Ashura, with the start of Yazid's army's all-out attack, Kinana drew his sword and manfully entered the battlefield. With his bravery and combat skills, he repelled the enemy's attacks.

Finally, this warrior and Quran reciter, after making many sacrifices, was martyred in that very first attack due to enemy arrows and swords, interpreting the Quranic verses with his blood.
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Kinana ibn Atiq.
